mitigation.title: Fix config file permissions
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by tightening config file permissions.

mitigation.title: Fix config directory permissions
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by tightening config directory permissions.

mitigation.title: Enable secret redaction
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by enabling security.redact_secrets.

mitigation.title: Evaluate local execution boundary
mitigation.description: Local terminal backend runs commands directly on host. Consider moving to a safer execution backend where possible.

items.action: Review whether this Hermes instance should execute tools on the local host
items.detail: Confirm host-level command execution is required for this workload.

items.action: Use stricter approval policies for local terminal backend
items.detail: Enforce gated approvals to reduce direct host-side execution risk.

mitigation.title: Re-enable approval gating
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by setting approvals.mode to a gated mode.

mitigation.title: Review custom endpoint exposure
mitigation.description: A custom non-local base_url can bypass expected trust boundaries if endpoint ownership is unclear.

items.action: Validate ownership and TLS settings of custom model endpoint
items.detail: Ensure endpoint certificate, domain ownership, and transport security meet policy.

items.action: Prefer local or private network endpoint where feasible
items.detail: Reduce external exposure by routing model traffic to trusted internal infrastructure.
